calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-12-2026 Dismissal - No Appearance

Motion For Order That Matters In Request For Admissions Be Deemed Admitted Pursuant To Ccp 2033.280
Off Calendar Dec-05-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Plaintiff Cavalry SPV I, LLC's unopposed Motion For Order That Matters In Request For Admissions Be Deemed Admitted Pursuant To CCP 2033.280 is GRANTED.

The record demonstrates Defendant Maritza F. Cruz did not provide any responses to Plaintiff's Request For Admissions. Set One. (See Code of Civil Procedure section 2033.280.) Defendant's failure to timely respond is not excused. No meet and confer requirement when no responses have been provided. Plaintiffs, however, conferred.

Plaintiffs' RFAs, Set One are deemed admitted.

Plaintiff is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the court's ruling and must drop a hard courtesy copy in Dept. 302's inbox.
Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-07-2025 Set For Trial On Jan-12-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
